description_long: This object is a bottle with a tall, narrow neck and a wider, rectangular base, giving it a modern, geometric appearance. The body is smooth and uniform in color, with no visible seams or decorative elements. The front face features a recessed rectangular area near the base, possibly indicating a label space or a grip feature. The neck transitions sharply from the body, maintaining a consistent width up to the top, which appears to be flat and closed. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a matte finish. There are no visible branding elements, text, or color variations on the exterior.
description: A minimalist, rectangular bottle with a tall neck, smooth matte surface, and a recessed area on the front base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular base, tall neck, and a recessed rectangular area near the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tapering body and the sharp transition to the narrow neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, uninterrupted surface and the full height of the bottle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the taper and neck transition.
